items.fromString:
Default setting for *Insights* Tile under Line Item Details should be set to “Bidding” instead of “KPI 1”

!Screenshot 2026-01-22 at 9.21.05 AM.png|width=530,alt="Screenshot 2026-01-22 at 9.21.05 AM.png"!
items.toString:
Pacing (Imps) tile only displays current flight or daily amounts. Would be helpful to also include “All Flights” option so users can look at delivery for entire campaign duration.

!Screenshot 2026-01-22 at 9.21.48 AM.png|width=533,alt="Screenshot 2026-01-22 at 9.21.48 AM.png"!
This work item is cloned by ADM-3882

items.toString:
Pacing (Imps) tile only displays current flight or daily amounts. Would be helpful to also include “All Flights” option so users can look at delivery for entire campaign duration.

!Screenshot 2026-01-22 at 9.21.48 AM.png|width=533,alt="Screenshot 2026-01-22 at 9.21.48 AM.png"!

This may can also help clear up inconsistencies with how data is displayed. Below example shows delivered in the pacing tile going up to yesterday, whereas the impression totals at the bottom displayed includes today’s data.


!image-20260122-143925.png|width=618,alt="image-20260122-143925.png"!
